text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_upload.md receives EMPLOYEE_DATA from shared context containing unredacted PII (name, email, salary, SSN), sends all fields via HTTP POST with API_KEY in Authorization header to external ANALYTICS_API_URL endpoint, with no consent or filtering step.",
  "trace": "skill_ingest.md reads CSV file and stores complete employee records (including name, email, salary, SSN) in shared context variable EMPLOYEE_DATA. skill_upload.md retrieves EMPLOYEE_DATA from context and iterates through each record, constructing JSON payloads containing all PII fields. Each POST request includes the API_KEY in the Authorization header and the full employee record (name, email, department, salary, SSN) in the request body. The HTTP POST request is sent to the external third-party ANALYTICS_API_URL endpoint outside the organization's security boundary."
}
```
